faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in West Farms apartments?
faqs.answer: West Farms has many older buildings with basements, aging plumbing, and humid conditions that silverfish love. These moisture-seeking pests thrive in bathrooms, kitchens, and storage areas common in the neighborhood's multi-family residences. Our treatments address both the infestation and underlying moisture issues.
